debug_info.goal:
𝕜 M : Type u
inst✝³ : Field 𝕜
inst✝² : AddCancelCommMonoid M
inst✝¹ : AddMonoid.FG M
inst✝ : IsAddTorsionFree M
⊢ IsDominant sorry

failed_attempts:
apply (AlgebraicGeometry.isDominant_affine_iff_nilradical _ _).mpr
    simp only [nilradical_eq_zero (R := AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M), RingHom.ker_eq_bot_iff]
    exact AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 GrothendieckAddGroup.toGrothendieck_injective

let f := AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainRingHom 𝕜 (embedding M)
    have : Function.Injective f := (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 _).mpr (embedding M).injective
    have : CategoryTheory.IsInjective (CommRingCat.ofHom f) := ⟨this⟩
    exact AlgebraicGeometry.dominant_of_injective (CommRingCat.ofHom f)

apply dominant_of_injective
    apply AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective
    exact (embedding M).injective

apply dominant_of_injective_ringHom
    apply AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜
    exact AffineAddMonoid.embedding_injective M

haveI : IsOpenImmersion torusEmb := isOpenImmersion_torusEmb
    haveI : IsIntegral (Diag Spec(𝕜) M) := (AlgebraicGeometry.affine_isIntegral_iff _).mpr inferInstance
    haveI : Nonempty (Diag Spec(𝕜) (GrothendieckAddGroup M)) := inferInstance
    exact IsOpenImmersion.isDominant_of_isIntegral torusEmb

apply isDominant_Spec_map_of_injective
    exact AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 (embedding_injective M)

have : torusEmb = Spec.map (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainRingHom 𝕜 (embedding M)) := sorry
    rw [this]
    apply Scheme.dominant_of_injective_ringHom
    apply AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective
    exact embedding_injective M

apply Spec_map_dominant_of_injective
    apply AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective
    exact embedding_injective M

rw [isDominant_affine_iff]
    intro x hx
    apply nil_of_eq_zero
    refine (RingHom.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot _).mp ?_ x hx
    exact AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 (embedding M) (embedding_injective M)

rw [AlgebraicGeometry.isDominant_affine_iff]
    rw [RingHom.ker_eq_bot_iff.mpr (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain_injective 𝕜 embedding_injective)]
    exact bot_le

apply isDominant_affine_of_injective
    exact mapDomain_injective (R := 𝕜) (embedding_injective M)

rw [Spec_map_dominant_iff, RingTheory.Nilpotent.nilradical_eq_zero, Submodule.bot_eq_zero]
    exact (RingHom.injective_iff_ker_eq_bot _).1 (mapDomain_injective 𝕜 _ (embedding_injective M))
